description: A commercial property manager must track and notify tenants of upcoming dates for lease renewal or expansion options.

nodes.task_description: Abstract all leases to identify and log critical dates, such as the notification deadline for a renewal option.

expected_outcome.value: All critical dates are extracted from leases and entered into a tracking system.

nodes.task_description: Set up automated reminders for the property manager and the tenant well in advance of the critical date.

expected_outcome.value: Automated alerts are scheduled in the system.

nodes.task_description: When an alert is triggered, send a formal notification to the tenant reminding them of their upcoming option deadline.

expected_outcome.value: The tenant receives a timely, formal reminder.
